phases.name: Phase 1
phases.label: CRITICAL (Week 1-4)
phases.focus: Super Admin, Sekretariat, UPTD + partial bidang routing
phases.target: Tutup isu KRITIS prioritas dan stabilkan akses inti lintas role kunci

phases.name: Phase 2
phases.label: HIGH (Week 5-8)
phases.focus: Bidang Ketersediaan, Bidang Distribusi + penguatan UPTD
phases.target: Kendalikan isu TINGGI pada dashboard, integrasi, dan data scope

phases.name: Phase 3
phases.label: MEDIUM (Week 9-16)
phases.focus: Bidang Konsumsi, Public Portal, privacy hardening
phases.target: Selesaikan data classification, anonymization, dan readiness publik
